RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - DENIED AS UNTIMELY. (301/PHA/AM(EX)) Court Reporter Sara Lerschen, CSR #6213

Off Calendar Feb-08-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

MOTION To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-16-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Myron R. Siegel (Court Call), Defendant Propria Persona (818) 595-2338
Robert J. Perkiss, Esq., Cook Perkiss & Lew (415) 989-4730 for Plaintiff and Opposing Party State Bar of California

RULING:
A R G U E D; DEFENDANT MYRON SIEGEL'S Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment is GRANTED and will be effective upon payment of reasonable attorney fees (noticed motion) to Plaintiff's counsel. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW/EH) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

MOTION To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-14-2004 Text Disposition
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Defendant E. Roy Siegel, (818) 788-8757, appeared in Propria Person through Court Call.
Robert J. Perkiss, Esq., Cook, Perkiss & Lew, (415) 989-4730, for Plaintiff and Opposing Party State Bar of California
RULING:
A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT MYRON SIEGEL'S MOTION To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment: DENIED FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CCP 473(b). Prevailing party is to prepare a proposed. (301/JLW/ac) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

Off Calendar Aug-18-2004 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Aug-24-2004 Denied
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT M. ROY SIEGEL'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS & COMPLAINT:
APPEARANCE: M. Roy Siegel, Defendant in Propria Persona (818) 728-1668 (via COURT CALL); no other appearances. (Deft did not comply with the tentative ruling rule re notice to the other party of his intent to appear at this hearing to argue. Therefore, the Court did not allow deft to argue.)
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - DENIED, and in addition, ruled without prejudice. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. (301/JLW/AC) Court Reporter Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
